market_data.info_single_only: Company info is only available for single symbol queries

rsi.title: RSI Indicator
rsi.description: Calculate Relative Strength Index (RSI) for technical analysis
rsi.extremely_overbought: Extremely overbought - price may reverse downward
rsi.overbought: Overbought - consider selling or waiting for pullback
rsi.slightly_overbought: Slightly overbought - monitor for reversal signals
rsi.extremely_oversold: Extremely oversold - price may reverse upward
rsi.oversold: Oversold - consider buying or waiting for bounce
rsi.slightly_oversold: Slightly oversold - monitor for reversal signals
rsi.strong_sell_recommendation: Strong sell signal - consider closing long positions or opening short positions
rsi.sell_recommendation: Sell signal - consider taking profits or reducing exposure
rsi.weak_sell_recommendation: Weak sell signal - monitor closely, consider reducing exposure
rsi.strong_buy_recommendation: Strong buy signal - consider opening long positions
rsi.weak_buy_recommendation: Weak buy signal - monitor closely, consider small positions
rsi.bearish_divergence: Bearish divergence detected - potential downward reversal
rsi.bullish_divergence: Bullish divergence detected - potential upward reversal

macd.title: MACD Indicator
macd.description: Calculate Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for technical analysis
macd.strong_bullish: Strong bullish momentum - MACD above signal with positive histogram
macd.bullish: Bullish momentum - MACD above signal line
macd.weak_bullish: Weak bullish - MACD above signal but histogram declining
macd.strong_bearish: Strong bearish momentum - MACD below signal with negative histogram
macd.bearish: Bearish momentum - MACD below signal line
macd.weak_bearish: Weak bearish - MACD below signal but histogram rising
macd.neutral: Neutral - MACD and signal lines are close together
macd.strong_buy_recommendation: Strong buy signal - both MACD and RSI indicate buying opportunity
macd.buy_recommendation: Buy signal - indicators suggest upward momentum
macd.weak_buy_recommendation: Weak buy signal - some bullish indicators present
macd.strong_sell_recommendation: Strong sell signal - both MACD and RSI indicate selling opportunity
macd.sell_recommendation: Sell signal - indicators suggest downward momentum
macd.weak_sell_recommendation: Weak sell signal - some bearish indicators present
macd.hold_recommendation: Hold signal - indicators are mixed or neutral
macd.bullish_crossover: Bullish crossover detected - MACD crossed above signal line
macd.bearish_crossover: Bearish crossover detected - MACD crossed below signal line
macd.strong_buy_combined: Strong buy - Multiple indicators confirm bullish signal
macd.weak_buy_combined: Weak buy - Some bullish indicators, proceed with caution
macd.strong_sell_combined: Strong sell - Multiple indicators confirm bearish signal
macd.weak_sell_combined: Weak sell - Some bearish indicators, proceed with caution
macd.hold_combined: Hold - Mixed signals, maintain current positions

kline.description: Analyze candlestick patterns and K-line data
